message: ci: capture service logs and wait longer for IPC

files.patch:
@@ -168,14 +168,14 @@ jobs:
         run: cargo run -p cli --release -- --help
       - name: Start service in background
         run: |
-          $svc = Start-Process -FilePath "target/release/service.exe" -ArgumentList "--console" -WindowStyle Hidden -PassThru
+          $svc = Start-Process -FilePath "target/release/service.exe" -ArgumentList "--console" -WindowStyle Hidden -PassThru -RedirectStandardOutput service.out -RedirectStandardError service.err
           $svc.Id | Out-File service.pid
       - name: Wait for IPC and run status
         run: |
-          Start-Sleep -Seconds 5
+          Start-Sleep -Seconds 10
           $servicePid = Get-Content service.pid
           $cli = "target/release/cli.exe"
-          $attempts = 20
+          $attempts = 30
           $ok = $false
           for ($i = 1; $i -le $attempts; $i++) {
             & $cli status --json
@@ -186,7 +186,13 @@ jobs:
             Write-Host "status attempt $i/$attempts failed; retrying in 3s"
             Start-Sleep -Seconds 3
           }
-          if (-not $ok) { throw "cli status never succeeded" }
+          if (-not $ok) {
+            Write-Host "===== service stdout ====="
+            Get-Content service.out -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
+            Write-Host "===== service stderr ====="
+            Get-Content service.err -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
+            throw "cli status never succeeded"
+          }
           Stop-Process -Id $servicePid
       - name: UI build presence
         run: Test-Path target/release/ui.exe | Out-Null
